use_cases: Toggle boolean settings in application preferences and user profiles
Select multiple items in lists or forms with multiple choice options
Enable or disable features within a settings panel
Capture user consent or agreement during onboarding flows
Mark tasks or items as complete in productivity applications
ai_summary: A lightweight, accessible checkbox component built on Radix UI primitives with native HTML checkbox functionality. Features proper focus states, keyboard navigation, and disabled state handling. Follows shadcn/ui design patterns with Tailwind CSS for styling and integrates seamlessly with form libraries.
